AIRLINK.summary: Select Technologies, Air Link's wholly owned subsidiary, received SECP/PSX approval for an IPO to fund a new AC plant and expand TV/smartphone manufacturing.
headlines: Select Technologies announces Rs2.5bn IPO to establish AC manufacturing facility in Pakistan

ATRL.summary: Finance Bill sales-tax relief on imported capital goods supports refinery upgrade and overhaul projects.
headlines: Refineries' upgradation: Sales tax waived on capital goods imports
